Increases Pet power by 25%.
+10%
Total Elimination
The Hands of the Orchestra take 10% more pure damage.

Keepers of Balance
When stepping into the material world, heroes heal 10% of their max HP.
+10%
Power Unleashed
The Hands of the Orchestra take 10% more Magic damage.
+10%
Sparkling Mood
Increases Pet Patronage power by 10%.

At the Speed of Light
The ability that allows heroes to step from one world to another recharges 5 sec faster.
+10%
Unbridled Energy
Heroes receive 10% bonus energy when stepping into the material world.
+10%
Through a Prism
When interrupting any of the Soloists' Motifs, heroes are sped up by 10% for 5 seconds.
+5%
The Healer's Gift
When heroes step into the material world, they receive 5% more healing for 5 seconds.
+200%
At the Limit
In the material world, heroes receive 200% of basic attack damage back as healing.

Effective Tactics

20
Perfect Storm
When stepping between worlds, all incoming damage to heroes is reduced by 10% for 20 seconds.
+30%
Power over Life
When stepping into the material world, heroes receive 30% of the healing blocked by Requiem.
+10%
Through a Prism
When interrupting any of the Soloists' Motifs, heroes are sped up by 10% for 5 seconds.
+5%

When heroes step into the material world, they receive 5% more healing for 5 seconds.

When stepping between worlds, all incoming damage to heroes is reduced by 10% for 20 seconds.
+30%
Power over Life
When stepping into the material world, heroes receive 30% of the healing blocked by Requiem.
+10%
Through a Prism
When interrupting any of the Soloists' Motifs, heroes are sped up by 10% for 5 seconds.
+5%
The Healer's Gift
When heroes step into the material world, they receive 5% more healing for 5 seconds.
ondeonde0000002.79M03.35M00.91%

5
At the Speed of Light
The ability that allows heroes to step from one world to another recharges 5 sec faster.
+10%
Unbridled Energy
Heroes receive 10% bonus energy when stepping into the material world.
20
Perfect Storm
When stepping between worlds, all incoming damage to heroes is reduced by 10% for 20 seconds.
+5%
The Healer's Gift
When heroes step into the material world, they receive 5% more healing for 5 seconds.
3
Reverie Given Form
When heroes step into the material world, they receive Harbinger's Barrier for 3 sec.
+30%
Power over Life
When stepping into the material world, heroes receive 30% of the healing blocked by Requiem.
+10%
Through a Prism
When interrupting any of the Soloists' Motifs, heroes are sped up by 10% for 5 seconds.

Secret Weapon

At the Speed of Light
The ability that allows heroes to step from one world to another recharges 5 sec faster.
+200%
At the Limit
In the material world, heroes receive 200% of basic attack damage back as healing.
-5%
Strength in Perseverance
Interrupting the Deafening Motif of the Thundering Horn requires 5% less healing.

Perfect Storm

+3
Charmer's Skill

+2
Pillar of Confidence
Harbinger's Barrier takes 2 sec longer to reach full efficiency.

The Tireless
The initial healing reduction of Requiem is 15% weaker.
5
At the Speed of Light
The ability that allows heroes to step from one world to another recharges 5 sec faster.
+200%
At the Limit
In the material world, heroes receive 200% of basic attack damage back as healing.
-3
Secret Weapon
Interrupting the Enervating Motif requires 3 fewer effects of control.
+10%
Through a Prism
When interrupting any of the Soloists' Motifs, heroes are sped up by 10% for 5 seconds.

mo-mo
130
130
130
130
130
130
172K183K178K195K63.2K121K912K13013.6M48.79%3.68%
+200%
At the Limit
In the material world, heroes receive 200% of basic attack damage back as healing.
3
Reverie Given Form
When heroes step into the material world, they receive Harbinger's Barrier for 3 sec.
+30%
Power over Life
When stepping into the material world, heroes receive 30% of the healing blocked by Requiem.
+10%
Unbridled Energy
Heroes receive 10% bonus energy when stepping into the material world.
20
Perfect Storm
When stepping between worlds, all incoming damage to heroes is reduced by 10% for 20 seconds.
+2
Pillar of Confidence
Harbinger's Barrier takes 2 sec longer to reach full efficiency.
+5%
The Healer's Gift
When heroes step into the material world, they receive 5% more healing for 5 seconds.

Power Unleashed
The Hands of the Orchestra take 25% more Magic damage.
+25%
Keepers of Balance
When stepping into the material world, heroes heal 25% of their max HP.
+25%
Total Elimination
The Hands of the Orchestra take 25% more pure damage.
-15%
The Tireless
The initial healing reduction of Requiem is 15% weaker.
+200%
At the Limit
In the material world, heroes receive 200% of basic attack damage back as healing.
+10%
Through a Prism

+30%
Power over Life
When stepping into the material world, heroes receive 30% of the healing blocked by Requiem.
+10%

-5%
